turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: Things at home have gotten scary. When he's angry he throws things and I don't feel safe.

turns.speaker: Advocate
turns.text: Thank you for trusting me with this. Your safety matters most — are you safe right now?

turns.speaker: Caller
turns.text: For tonight, yes. But I'm always walking on eggshells, afraid of setting him off again.
